description.p: You have mastered the ancestral art of mate infusion, using carefully selected herbs and preparation techniques to create beverages with powerful beneficial effects.

Mate Preparation. While taking a short or long rest, you can prepare a mate round. You must have access to special herbs and water to do so. Each mate round can benefit up to {{proficiency}} creatures. Each effect has its own duration and requirements.
Material Components. Preparing mate requires special herbs and ingredients. Your DM determines the cost and availability of these materials.
Multiple Rounds. Only one effect can be active at a time. If you prepare one round while another is active, the previous round's effect ends.
Mate Effects. When a round is consumed, you choose one of the following effects for all creatures:

ul.li: Restoration. The creature gains the effect of a Lesser Restoration spell.
Vitality. The creature can use a number of hit dice equal to your proficiency bonus. They roll the dice and heal accordingly.
Fortune. The creature has advantage on ability checks or saving throw of the Skill(checks) or Ability(ST) for 1 hour.
Inspiration. The creature gains the effects of Bless for 1 hour.

sheet.description: Prepare a round of mate using special herbs affecting up to {{proficiency}} creatures. Each creature gains: Lesser Restoration, or {{proficiency}} Hit Dice, or advantage on 1 ability skill checks or 1 ability saving throws (1 hr), or Bless effect (1 hr). Requires special material components.
